name: Wu Peifu
shortDesc: Général aérienne or — République populaire de Chine.
longDesc: Wu Peifu est un général aérienne de qualité or — République populaire de Chine. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Star Fall
skills.desc: When commanding troops to attack, there is a 60% chance to trigger a Level II satellite strike on the target. When commanding air hover units, the damage dealt by this satellite strike is increased by an extra 30%.

skills.name: Inescapable Net
skills.desc: Enemy units within 3 tiles of the commanding unit have their defense reduced by 30% and also take 20% increased damage from nuclear bombs, satellite strikes, and drone tactical explosion.

skills.name: System-of-Systems Operations
skills.desc: When commanding troops to attack and carry out airstrikes, there is a 36% chance of dealing a critical attack.

skills.name: Strategic Attack
skills.desc: After commanding a unit to attack, if the target is not annihilated, there is 60% chance that a tracking mark will be added to that target. Targets with tracking marks receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turns.

skills.name: Inferior Victory
skills.desc: Damage is increased by 16% when the number of troop formations under command is 1.

sources: Données extraites de l'APK World Conqueror 4
